ingredients.name: Takatoro Jotomyodai
ingredients.address: Takatōrō Jōtōmyōdai, 2 Chome-2 Kudanminami, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 102-0074, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This historic stone lantern near Yasukuni Shrine is visible in the Kudanshita area scenes of episode 1, part of the distinctive skyline Banri passes while lost on his first day in Tokyo.

ingredients.name: Hosei University
ingredients.address: Hosei University, 2 Chome-17-1 Fujimi, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 102-8160, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Hosei University served as the real-world model for Kansei University, where Banri Tada and Koko Kaga begin their college lives. Fans recognize the campus gates and lawns from the opening episodes where Banri first encounters the rose-wielding Koko.

ingredients.name: Ichigaya Mitsuke Police Box
ingredients.localName: 麴町警察署 市ケ谷見付交番
ingredients.address: Ichigaya Mitsuke Police Box, 4 Chome-4-1 Kudankita, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 102-0073, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The police box near Ichigaya appears in episode 1 during Banri's confused wandering after the entrance ceremony, a small landmark that marks the start of his new Tokyo life.

ingredients.name: Horai-bashi Bridge
ingredients.address: Horai Bridge, 2 Chome-地先 Minami, Shimada, Shizuoka 427-0111, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Horai-bashi is the world's longest wooden pedestrian toll bridge, depicted in a travel episode as the group ventures outside Tokyo. Its long wooden planks stretching over the Oigawa River provide a visually distinct contrast to the urban campus setting.

ingredients.name: Ichigaya Station
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒102-0076 Tokyo, Chiyoda City, Gobancho, Ichigaya Station, 千代田 区 九段 南 ４ 丁目 新宿 区 市谷 田町 １ 丁目
ingredients.entityContext: Ichigaya Station is the everyday transit hub for the cast, appearing repeatedly when characters commute to and from Kansei University. Banri and Koko share several quiet moments on the platform and the bridge nearby.

ingredients.name: Sotobori Park
ingredients.address: Sotobori Park, 無番地 Gobancho, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 102-0076, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The park alongside the old Edo castle moat is a recurring backdrop for walks and conversations between Banri and Koko, capturing the slow-burn warmth of their growing relationship in the Ichigaya neighborhood.

ingredients.name: Starbucks Coffee - Kudanshita
ingredients.localName: スターバックス コーヒー 九段下店
ingredients.address: Starbucks Coffee - Kudanshita, 九段北一丁目ビル 1F 1 Chome-2-1 Kudankita, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 102-0073, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This Starbucks near Kudanshita appears in episode 5 as a meeting spot for the cast, one of several modern Tokyo cafes used to frame casual hangouts between Banri, Koko, and their circle.

ingredients.name: Hotel Grand Hill Ichigaya
ingredients.localName: ホテルグランドヒル市ヶ谷
ingredients.address: Hotel Grand Hill Ichigaya, 4-1 Ichigayahonmuracho, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 162-0845, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Hotel Grand Hill Ichigaya appears in episode 6 as a venue connected to a formal event attended by the characters, reflecting the mix of everyday student life and occasionally upscale Tokyo settings in the series.

ingredients.name: Shinkawa Bridge
ingredients.address: Shinkawa Park, 1 Chome-31-1 Shinkawa, Chuo City, Tokyo 104-0033, Japan

ingredients.name: NewDays Ichigaya
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒102-0073 Tokyo, Chiyoda City, Gobancho, 2 JR Ichigaya Station, NewDays, ２Ｆ＿改札外正面

ingredients.localName: みなとゴルフ 市ケ谷校
ingredients.address: Minato Golf Ichigayako, 市ヶ谷スポーツプラザ 4 Chome-2-22 Kudankita, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 102-0073, Japan

ingredients.address: Yanasegawa Station, 2-chōme-5 Tate, Shiki, Saitama 353-0006, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Yanasegawa Station in Saitama appears in episode 12 during a journey connected to Banri revisiting his past, underscoring the show's recurring theme of memory and identity.

ingredients.name: Yomiuri Land
ingredients.address: 1-4015-1 Yanokuchi, Tama Ward, Inagi, Tokyo 206-8725, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Yomiuri Land is the amusement park featured in episode 8 where Banri and Koko enjoy a date together, including the merry-go-round sequence that becomes a turning point in their relationship.

ingredients.name: Kinshicho Station
ingredients.address: 3 Chome-14-6 Kotobashi, Sumida City, Tokyo 130-0022, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Kinshicho Station in Sumida appears in episode 16, used as a transit point during an outing that takes characters across the city and away from the usual Ichigaya campus area.

ingredients.name: Nippon Budokan
ingredients.address: 2-3 Kitanomarukoen, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 102-8321, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Budokan appears in episode 1 when a newly arrived Banri gets hopelessly lost after his university entrance ceremony, setting the chain of events that leads him to meet Koko. The iconic octagonal roof is visible in background shots of the Kudanshita area.

ingredients.name: Kichijoji Station
ingredients.address: Kichijoji Minamicho, Musashino, Tokyo, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Kichijoji Station appears in episode 15 as characters venture out to the popular west Tokyo neighborhood, a brief but recognizable landmark in the show's wider Tokyo geography.

ingredients.name: Yashirobashi
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-17 Shinbashi, Minato City, Tokyo 105-0004, Japan

ingredients.name: Hijiri Bridge
ingredients.address: 4 Chome Kanda Surugadai, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 101-0062, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Hijiri Bridge over the Kanda River is captured in episode 2, with its elegant arc framing a conversation scene between Banri and his friends as they explore the campus neighborhood together.

ingredients.name: Kudanshita Station
ingredients.address: Kudanshita Station, 1 Chome-13-19 Kudankita, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 102-0073, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Kudanshita Station is central to the Ichigaya campus arc, appearing whenever characters travel to or from the university district. Its exits and surroundings are depicted in multiple early episodes.
